series_metadata.series_description: All compliance reviews with comments and responses, constructability reviews, variance applications and supporting documentation, and estimates. Also includes, but is not limited to, documents related to Value Engineering decisions, LEED documents, and phase review materials (including acceptance forms).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, then kept for three years after project financial close. ; Electronic: Kept for three years after project financial close., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
